name: Parramatta
heroAlt: Open-plan kitchen and living renovation — custom joinery in Western Sydney
metaTitle: Custom Joinery & Kitchen Renovations Parramatta | InsideOut Joinery & Renos
metaDescription: Custom kitchens, wardrobes, laundries and joinery-led renovations in Parramatta and Western Sydney. Liverpool-based team, Sydney-wide service, real project references.
intro: Parramatta is one of Sydney's most active renovation suburbs — a mix of established family homes being updated and newer apartments where storage and joinery quality make a real difference. We work across Parramatta regularly, delivering custom kitchens, wardrobes, laundry joinery and broader renovation scopes that suit the way Western Sydney homes are actually used.
localContext: Parramatta homeowners tend to want renovation work that adds lasting value — not a quick cosmetic refresh. The homes here vary from older weatherboard and brick properties with non-standard dimensions to modern apartments where every centimetre of storage counts. Custom joinery handles both situations better than modular alternatives.
projectReferenceNote: Our Pemulwuy project is a strong Western Sydney reference showing a full kitchen and study fitout in a home close to Parramatta — same area, same standard of finish.
whyChoose: Western Sydney experience — we understand local homes and renovation expectations
Custom kitchens, wardrobes, laundries and full renovation scopes
Liverpool-based team with no cross-city travel delays
Real project references from nearby Pemulwuy, Harrington Park and Lurnea

faqs.question: Do you service Parramatta for kitchen renovations?
faqs.answer: Yes. We work across Parramatta and the broader Western Sydney area regularly. Being based in Liverpool means we are close to Parramatta and can get to site quickly.

faqs.question: Can you work on both houses and apartments in Parramatta?
faqs.answer: Yes. We work on both. Apartments often need more creative storage solutions given the floor areas, and older houses frequently benefit from made-to-measure cabinetry that handles non-standard dimensions.

faqs.question: What joinery services do you offer in Parramatta?
faqs.answer: Kitchens, wardrobes, laundry joinery, bathroom vanities, shelving and custom storage. Multiple rooms can be quoted together as a single renovation scope.

faqs.question: How do I get started on a Parramatta project?
faqs.answer: Send us photos of the space, your floor plan if you have one, and a brief description of what you are trying to achieve. We can usually give you a realistic budget range within a day.

ctaText: Planning a kitchen, wardrobe or renovation in Parramatta? We are close by and ready to quote your project properly.
